summary: Audited tenant nullable paths after the canonical nrg migration, classified runtime and migration/doc paths with prune criteria, and emitted proof/enforcement follow-up slices.

acceptance_results.criterion: Remaining tenant nullable codepaths are inventoried and classified as delete_now, collapse_into_canonical, keep_as_permanent_capability, or needs_human_decision.
No enforcement migration is added unless the audit proves it is safe for the touched table set.
Follow-up implementation slices are emitted for any table group that still needs runtime proof.

cleanup_notes: No remote database mutation was performed.
completed_work: Ran the required nullable-path static audit.
Classified migration tooling and docs as temporary enforcement proof surfaces rather than runtime tenantless ownership.
Classified acquisition slug-only reads, reports nullable joins, and cadence nullable joins as canonical-collapse follow-ups.
Classified tenantless seed upserts as delete-now candidates for the enforcement slice.
Emitted TMP-053, TMP-054, and TMP-055 issues and work orders.
known_gaps: Live production row counts were not available in TMP-052, so NOT NULL enforcement is deferred to proof slices.
Historical migration files still contain nullable tenant paths; cleanup must be forward-only.
operator_message: TMP-052 is an audit/readiness slice: no schema enforcement was attempted without live proof. Runtime nullable tenant paths are now tracked as concrete follow-up work.
risk_notes: Forcing NOT NULL in TMP-052 would have been speculative because active runtime nullable paths and historical nullable schema lanes remain.
TMP-055 must wait for TMP-053 and TMP-054 proof before changing runtime/schema enforcement.

validation.command: rg -n "tenant_id IS NULL|tenant_id = NULL|WHERE .*tenant_id IS NULL|tenant_id UUID" services scripts docs frontend -g '!**/node_modules/**'
validation.output_excerpt: Returned documented nullable paths in migration tooling, docs, historical migrations, acquisition runtime, subscription runtime schema bootstrap, and cadence runtime joins.
No issues returned assignment_decision block after TMP-053/TMP-054/TMP-055 classification fixes.

validation.command: jq empty slices/manifest.json agent/state/TMP-052.work-order.json agent/state/TMP-053.work-order.json agent/state/TMP-054.work-order.json agent/state/TMP-055.work-order.json

validation.output_excerpt: ok true; only known stale superseded ledger warning.
